name: Mem0
description: Thin OpenClaw bridge for an external upstream Mem0 server.

baseUrl.label: Mem0 Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the external Mem0 server that OpenClaw should use.

userId.label: Mem0 User ID
userId.help: Stable long-term memory namespace. Leave unset to isolate memory per OpenClaw agent.

topK.label: Top K
topK.help: Maximum memories to search or list per scope.

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
requestTimeoutMs.help: HTTP timeout for Mem0 API calls.
